title: Aberia Ascended
description: Aberia Ascended is a curated Conquest Reforged modpack focused on immersive medieval gameplay. It expands building, combat, magic, and quality-of-life features
body:
# Aberia Ascended – Official Modpack


**A carefully curated Conquest Reforged modpack designed for the Aberia Ascended private server.**


🏰 **What to expect**

An immersive medieval experience enhanced with meaningful additions — expanded, but never over the top.

⚔️ **Core Features**

- Deeply expanded Building options
  
- Improved and rebalanced Combat
  
- Integrated Magic systems that fit the setting
  
- Numerous Quality of Life improvements
  
- Thoughtful balance changes for long-term gameplay

🌍 **Design Philosophy and world building**

This modpack focuses on immersion and cohesion, adding content that naturally fits the medieval fantasy world of Conquest Reforged rather than overwhelming it.

🧑‍💻 **Singleplayer Friendly**

While built for multiplayer, the modpack is fully playable and enjoyable in singleplayer as well.
